Which of the following statements is most accurate regarding infection with parvovirus B19?
options: Parvovirus B19 causes severe anemia because it preferentially infects erythrocyte precursors.

correct_answer: Parvovirus B19 causes severe anemia because it preferentially infects erythrocyte precursors.
